omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Sharing Personal Information
We may share your personal information with third parties for business purposes, including:
• Advertising Networks: To provide tailored advertising based on your activities,
contents, profile, browsing history and preferences.
•
Data Analytics Providers: To understand app and website usage patterns and improve
our services.
